serviceNotes.engine oil: M111 2.0L four-cylinder: fixed EU plan 15,000 km or 12 months typical.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service — E 200 Kompressor 15,000 km / 12 months (W211 proxy; M111 W210 EU fixed Oil Service matches this interval)
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210/S210) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — engine air filter replacement per maintenance table (60,000 km / 48 months typical M111 EU Inspection schedule); Tier 2 https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service gives 15,000 km for 1.8 Kompressor only — not same engine
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W210 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — spark plugs M111 four-cylinder 60,000 km / 48 months
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — long-life coolant first replacement per MB table (commonly 160,000 km for approved coolant)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil preventive ~100,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory / serpentine belt ~100,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W210 EU maintenance orientation; confirm condition
